label: Think node conditional close to duty target
description: Conditional node whose condition passes when the pawn is within maxDistToDutyTarget cells of its duty focus. Private in source but maxDistToDutyTarget is XML-backed. Inherits ThinkNode_Conditional fields (including invert) and base ThinkNode fields.

maxDistToDutyTarget.label: Max dist to duty target
maxDistToDutyTarget.description: Maximum distance in cells from the pawn's duty focus for the condition to pass. Private in C# source but loaded from XML.
